hero.subtitle: Engineered for focus. Designed for silence. A curated collection of high-end tech gear for the professional environment.

brands.trustedBy: Featured in the worlds most refined workspaces

features.title: Built for <1>performance</1>.
features.subtitle: Three pillars of design focused on creating a workspace that empowers deep work and precision.
features.trackingDesc: Every switch and surface is tuned for a deep, satisfying thock. Zero rattle, zero distractions.
features.personalizationDesc: Anodized aluminum, premium PBT, and reinforced glass. Built to last a lifetime of focus.
features.predictiveDesc: Angles and curves designed to support your natural posture during extended sessions.
features.checkoutDesc: Universal compatibility across systems. One cable, infinite focus.

testimonials.title: Choice of <1>professionals</1>.
testimonials.quote1: Zento keyboards are the first tools that actually disappear while I work. The silence is profound.
testimonials.quote2: The monitor bar changed how I see my desk. No glare, just perfect illumination on my work.
testimonials.quote3: Minimalism that doesn't compromise on utility. Every piece feels intentional.

cta.title: Refine your <1>workspace</1> today.
cta.subtitle: Join the collective of professionals who choose precision over noise.

products.catalogDescription: Each piece is engineered for the modern professional workspace.
products.noProductsHint: Try adjusting your filters or browse our full collection.

footer.brand: Precision Workspace Gear. Engineered for focus, designed for silence.

hero.headline: The Art of Silence. The Science of Focus.
hero.subtext: We create instruments for the modern professional. Designed for the quiet pursuit of mastery.

currentEdit.headline: Your Aesthetic Signature
currentEdit.subtext: Implicitly curated based on your interaction.

personaSwitcher.copy: Sync your workspace to your ritual.

systemFit.headline: Pre-configured Workspace Setups
systemFit.description: Our pieces are built to function as a singular environment. Integrated ecosystems for the modern professional.

ritualOfUse.headline: The Precision Ritual
ritualOfUse.tone: Focus. Control. The calculated movement of the professional workflow. Every interaction is a calibrated act of intent.

materialDepth.headline: Material Density
materialDepth.focus: Structural integrity. Anodized metal, tempered glass, precision polymer. The industrial weight of high-grade components.

transmissionFeed.refining: The Night Owl profile activated in New York.
